content.text:
```mdl
@ Confidentiality and Non‑Disclosure Agreement governing the inspection of the stockholder list
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_14_nda_10

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – Parties
type Party = {
    name: string,                     # e.g. "Patriot Scientific Corporation" or "Stockholder"
    is_company: bool,                 # true for the Company, false for the Stockholder
    disclosed_confidential_material: bool,   # has the party disclosed any Confidential Material?
    disclosed_agreement_existence: bool,     # has the party disclosed that the Agreement exists?
    required_to_disclose: bool,               # is the party legally required to disclose Confidential Material?
    notified_company_within_2_days: bool,     # has the party notified the Company within 2 business days?
    used_for_reasonable_purposes: bool,       # is the Confidential Material used only for permissible purposes?
    amendment_written: bool                   # is any amendment to the Agreement in writing and signed?
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – The two parties to the Agreement
entity company: Party
entity stockholder: Party

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – Obligations, Prohibitions and Permissions
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – Use of Confidential Material only for permissible purposes
rule O stockholder_use_for_reasonable_purposes:
    stockholder.used_for_reasonable_purposes always

@ Clause 2 – Prohibit disclosure of Confidential Material (any form)
rule F stockholder_disclose_confidential_material:
    not stockholder.disclosed_confidential_material always

@ Clause 3 – If disclosure is legally required, notify the Company promptly
rule O stockholder_notify_company_if_required:
    (stockholder.required_to_disclose implies stockholder.notified_company_within_2_days) always

@ Clause 4 – Exclusive jurisdiction of the Delaware Court of Chancery
rule O exclusive_jurisdiction_delaware:
    true always   # (jurisdiction is a factual assumption of the model; no field needed)

@ Clause 5 – Remedies for breach (specific performance / injunctive relief)
rule O company_irreparable_harm:
    true always   # placeholder – no concrete field needed for consistency checking

@ Clause 6 – Amendments must be in writing and signed by the other Party
rule F amendment_without_written:
    not (company.amendment_written and stockholder.amendment_written) always

@ Clause 7 – Agreement binds successors and assigns (no explicit field required)
rule O binding_to_successors:
    true always

@ Clause 8 – Governing law is Delaware (no explicit field required)
rule O governing_law_delaware:
    true always

@ Clause 9 – Multiple counterparts constitute a single agreement (no explicit field required)
rule O multiple_counterparts_one_agreement:
    true always

@ Clause 10 – Entire agreement clause (no explicit field required)
rule O entire_agreement_supersedes_prior:
    true always

@ Clause 11 – No construction against either party due to authorship (no explicit field required)
rule O no_authorship_construction:
    true always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Hypothesis – Receiving Party shall not disclose that the Agreement was agreed or negotiated
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Hypothesis
rule F receiving_party_disclose_agreement_existence:
    (company.disclosed_agreement_existence or stockholder.disclosed_agreement_existence) = false always
```
